svg.text: FHIR R4 API Server — Application Flow
Nginx Reverse Proxy — TLS 1.2+ termination, HSTS, OCSP stapling
+ ConsentEnforcement (deny provisions, actor/purpose filtering) + PatientContext filtering
Circuit breaker status, memory, DB connectivity
String | Token | Date | Reference | Number | Quantity | URI | Composite — Modifiers: :exact, :contains, :missing, :not, :text, :above, :below
TLS termination at Nginx reverse proxy (HSTS, OCSP stapling)
Express middleware: body parsing, Helmet security headers, CORS, correlation ID, audit logging, metrics
Guards: SMART JWT auth + scope check, rate limiting, dangerous operation guard, request timeout
Controller: route matching, consent enforcement, patient-context filtering, validation, XML/JSON
Service: business logic, CRUD, search (chaining, includes, $in batching), event emission
Database: MongoDB replica set (4 collections), versioning, indexes, TTL, profiler
FHIR R4 API Server v0.12.0 — NestJS + MongoDB + Docker
